name: Iron Man Parkour
description: This is a strategy game with excellent playing methods. This game is launched in the card game mode. Many powerful characters are recruited here to fight for you. At the same time, there are a lot of activities to participate in. As long as you are lucky, all kinds of powerful card characters can definitely be drawn. Players like to try it quickly.
instructions: Click the screen to start the game control the direction left and right and control the jump up and down
